name: MPI Fabric Diagnostics
summary: Collect MPI transport and fabric evidence for multi-node Slurm jobs.
description: This skill helps users and support teams diagnose MPI communication setup by recording MPI launcher details, Open MPI MCA hints, UCX and libfabric provider evidence, optional InfiniBand device visibility, and a tiny multi-node MPI communication probe.

inputs.name: account
inputs.description: Site-specific Slurm account or allocation for the short MPI fabric diagnostic job.

inputs.name: partition
inputs.description: Slurm partition or queue for the diagnostic job.

inputs.name: mpi_module
inputs.description: Optional MPI module to load before collecting tool and runtime evidence.

inputs.name: task_shape
inputs.description: Nodes, tasks per node, and total MPI ranks for a small communication probe.

inputs.name: transport_hints
inputs.description: Optional reviewed environment hints such as UCX_TLS, UCX_NET_DEVICES, FI_PROVIDER, or Open MPI MCA settings.

outputs.name: fabric_environment_report
outputs.description: MPI, UCX, libfabric, PMIx, Slurm, and optional InfiniBand evidence captured before launch.

outputs.name: mpi_probe_plan
outputs.description: Dry-run compile and srun command lines for the tiny MPI fabric probe.

outputs.name: mpi_probe_report
outputs.description: Small MPI communication timing and rank placement evidence written only when RUN_MPI_FABRIC_PROBE=1.

tests.description: Validate the manifest and referenced examples.

Submit the wrapper with RUN_MPI_FABRIC_PROBE=0 to review tool evidence and the launch plan, then set RUN_MPI_FABRIC_PROBE=1 on a short multi-node partition and confirm mpi-fabric-probe.tsv is written.

references.title: Open MPI InfiniBand and RoCE support
